name: alert
description: An inline message banner; severity drives both colour and the ARIA live role (destructive/warning are assertive role=alert, info/success are polite role=status). Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the alert partial to your JTE root at lievit/alert.jte, reached as @template.lievit.alert(variant=..., content=@`...`). Variant drives colour + live role; pass an optional heading. The source is yours: edit freely.
